headline: 2026 CapitalCISO ORBIE Awards Recognize Top Security Executives
summary: Leading CISOs honored for leadership, enterprise security, and business impact MCLEAN, Va., June 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The 2026 CapitalCISO ORBIE Awards honored leading chief information security officers (CISOs) from Northrop Grumman Corporation, Navy Federal Credit Union, Office of Personnel Management, Calvert County Government & University of Maryland Medical System for their exceptional leadership.
